evaluation.summary: At k=16 the double and extended-precision terms are identical, suggesting the 64‑bit precision collapse is not caused by the log‑gamma term.
next_directions: Extend the analysis to higher k values to locate where the mantissa-bit loss occurs.
Investigate hardware-specific rounding and extended-precision library implementations for possible hidden artifacts.
Perform a systematic comparison of LDAB calibration against alternative models to identify the true source of the 10‑bit collapse.
